name: forward_render_static
description: Still frame of the loaded scene on the forward pipeline, FLIP-compared against the published ground truth.

name: deferred_render_static
description: Still frame of the loaded scene on the deferred pipeline, FLIP-compared against the published ground truth.

name: forward_render_static_halfres
description: Still frame on the forward pipeline at render_scale 0.5. The output must stay at full resolution (size mismatch fails the evaluator) and FLIP-match the full-resolution ground truth within an upsampling-softness allowance.

name: gpu_render_static
description: Still frame on the gpu path-tracing pipeline, FLIP-compared against the published ground truth. Needs hardware ray tracing, which no hosted runner exposes, so it stays local-only.

name: cpu_render_static
description: Still frame on the cpu path-tracing pipeline, FLIP-compared against the published ground truth. Too slow for CI runners, so it stays local-only.

name: camera_nudge_return
description: Camera drag-out-and-return round trip; the evaluator FLIP-compares the before and after screenshots.

name: primitive_move
description: Moves one mesh between two screenshots; the evaluator requires a visible difference, guarding acceleration structure refits for moved primitives.

name: usd_round_trip
description: Render, export to USD, reload and re-render; the evaluator FLIP-compares the two screenshots.

name: usd_loader_semantics
description: USD scene semantics and packaged USD/glTF texture identity resolution.

name: usd_loader_semantics_rebuild
description: usd_loader_semantics under rebuild_cache: packaged artifacts must resolve when nothing can recook. Recooks from sources in a dev tree, so it stays out of coverage runs.

name: input_injection
description: Synthetic mouse and touch sequences through InputManager::Push.

name: cooker_request
description: Cooker cache-hit delivery and relocated-content contracts.

name: image_io
description: Image file content detection, channel normalization, storage sizing, and synchronous writes.

name: texture_compression
description: Block-compressed texture encode/decode invariants for every profile and family, plus source identity canonicalization rules.

name: scene_load_failure
description: Scene async failure propagation for a missing authored sky resource.

name: render_target_pool
description: RHIRenderTargetPool reuse and release semantics on the render thread.

name: dynamic_buffer_reuse
description: Staged buffer uploads, dynamic suballocation capacity, reuse, and adjacent free-range coalescing.

name: vulkan_image_subresources
description: Vulkan image layout tracking and readback for a selected cube face and mip.

name: pipeline_switch_pool
description: Runtime pipeline switch and pooled render-target reuse.

name: ibl_parity
description: CPU IBL cook jobs compared against their GPU producers. Needs a physical GPU; its deliberate artifact recook would trip the suite's cook gate, so it runs only via --case.

name: smoke
description: Init and scene-load sanity check.

name: surface_loss_recovery
description: Native window destroy/restore mid-run (screen off/on driven by the android runner); the recreated surface and swapchain must reproduce the pre-loss frame. Android only.

name: nrd_probe
description: Cooked ReBLUR pipelines compile to PSOs on the current GPU. Apple platforms only.

name: denoiser_runtime_toggle
description: Runtime denoiser provider selection during and after accumulation.
